3069260.name: RMP: Role Music Player
3069260.description:
We want to take different musical languages around the world closer to storytellers and RPG players.

The Role Music Player (RMP) is an interactive audio controller application that allows sound manipulation in different layers aiming to offer to users a total control of volume and density. All that in an organic and continuous way.

In the application it is possible to load different themed packages called “Dimensions”. Each one has 5 musical themes, 5 ambient sounds and 10 stingers (short sounds for pontual and important moments in the narrative). Every “Dimension” explores a specific subgenre that exists into a broader context like Dungeons and Dragons, Cyberpunk and Call of Cthulhu. All directed to the universe of Role Playing Games and to storytellers, our main public.

RMP’s great differential is the possibility to control the music density in real time, allowing the narrator to keep their voice present (without the need to lower the audio volume) and at the same time as they collaborate to create narrative moments either intense or calm.

C O L L A B O R A T I V E   P R O J E C T 

Storytelling is fueled by different cultures that we have around the world as they are rich and extremely diverse. Fiction is inspired in real stories and so is the contrary. In this context the Role Music Player looks into approaching these different cultures in the means of a collaborative musical production project in which the artist is at the center of distribution and everything they bring to the table is welcomed. We believe that for every story there is a unique soundtrack hidden somewhere out there and the Role Music Player aims to be the bridge in which this soundtrack is discovered and reaches storytellers. Every single one of these interactive albums will be signed by a specific artist and will be called “Dimension” inside the RMP.

S T A C K I N G   L A Y E R S

Storytelling impacts us by its capacity to vary emotion and subdue expectations. In this sense the RMP offers to each one of its “Dimensions” 5 different musical themes to accompany the nuances in each narrative and maintain the instrumental and originality between the themes.

D E N S I T Y   C O N T R O L

This project’s grand differential is the possibility to control the density of each musical theme, allowing that the immersion provided by the musical tracks don’t lose themselves but also adapt to each narrator’s style. Using the low density setting makes it not necessary to lower the volume of the music as it tends to overshadow the narration. At the same time, it is possible to reserve the high density settings to epic moments in the narration. The density control was developed through the manipulation of the quantity of instruments and the application of dynamic filters that allow the users a broad gama of immersion possibilities.

N E X T   U P D A T E S

D0001: 20XX

Explore a chaotic future with grand settings and challenging battles.

Free Dimension (DLC)

- Genre: Cyberpunk

- Composer: Arlam Junior

D0002: Grand Adventure

Enter a fantastic world filled with creatures, mystical beings, and dangerous adventures.

Free Dimension

- Genre: D&D

- Composer: Vinicius Meireles

D0003: Fangs and Masks

Be part of the underground nightlife of the big capital and discover what really goes on behind the curtains.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: Vampire:The Masquerade

- Composer: Dan Bariani

D0004: Epic Dungeons 

Embark on a medieval adventure facing epic challenges.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: D&D

- Composer: Franklly Thallyson

D0005: New Paths for Travellers 

Lead a small group of explorers in the search for new worlds.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: D&D

- Composer: Arlam Junior

D0006: March of the Dwarves 

Experience the mining culture of the mountain dwarves, with their marches designed to withstand the pace of their heavy work.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: D&D

- Composer: Vinicius Meireles

D0007: The Call 

Embark on an environmental horror tale set in the United States of the 1920s.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: Call of Cthulhu

- Composer: Dan Bariani

D0008: Gothic Punk 

Embark on a retro dystopian world full of intrigue and new technologies.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: Cyberpunk

- Composer: Eduardo Kolody

D0009: Lost in the Forest 

Discover the mysteries of a green and vast world, experiencing dangers and intrigue.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: D&D

- Composer: Arlam Junior

D0010: Emperor's Wrath 

Fight on the front lines for humanity in the heavenly war at the Emperor's command!

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: Warhammer 40k

- Composer: Vinicius Meireles

D0011: Arkham Mysteries 

Investigate the strange and supernatural cases rumored to occur in the isolated city of Arkham. Were they real or just urban legends to scare tourists? In any case, there is something intriguing about that city.

Paid Dimension (DLC) 

- Genre: Call of Cthulhu

- Composer: Franklly Thallyson

O U R   T E A M

Executive Production: Brasbravel Studio

Music Production: Arlam Junior e Vinicius Meireles

Programming: Adriano Regino

Accessibility Consultancy: Mika

Original Music: Arlam Junior, Vinicius Meireles, Dan Bariani, Eduardo Kolody e Franklly Thallyson

Cover Art: Flora

B E   P A R T   O F   O U R   P R O D U C T I O N   T E A M

Interested in collaborating with us? Send us an e-mail (brasbravel@gmail.com) with the following informations and we will get back to you:

Name

E-mail

Dimension Package Suggestion

Link with a musical demo

Este projeto é realizado com recursos da Lei Paulo Gustavo do Governo Federal operacionalizado pelo Governo de Goiás, por meio da Secretaria de Estado da Cultura.
3069260.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
